payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial/cropped dark-stained wooden side table with ornate carved vertical molding and glossy finish; top surface shows a small cloth or doily and the table is partially obscured by a dark leather sofa in the foreground, estimated about 1.2 m from the camera.
